basic_details.job_title: MECON Junior Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 50 years. Age relaxation for Persons with Disabilities: By 10 years for General (UR). Age relaxation for J&K domicile: 5 Years (01.01.1980 to 31.12.1989). Age relaxation for Ex-Servicemen: As per Govt. of India guidelines. Further 01 year relaxation for every 01 year additional experience (max 03 years). Maximum age on cut-off date shall not exceed 52 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline, MBA/PGDM in HR will be added advantage
qualification.details: Junior Officer (Admin.): Graduate in any discipline. MBA/ PGDM in HR will be an added advantage.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MECON to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MECON Junior Officer (Admin.) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the MECON Junior Officer (Admin.) position is 20th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Junior Officer (Admin.) post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Graduate degree in any discipline. An MBA/PGDM in HR is considered an added advantage.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Junior Officer (Admin.) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Officer (Admin.) post is 50 years, with provisions for age relaxation as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Officer (Admin.) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Officer (Admin.) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 1000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, the application fee for SC/ST candidates is also Rs. 1000/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the MECON Junior Officer (Admin.) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will involve a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Junior Officer (Admin.) position?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 1,20,000 per month.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for MECON Junior Officer (Admin.) recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q10. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the MECON Junior Officer (Admin.) recruitment is strictly online.
